name: The Community Bank
description_short: Community Bank is a full-service regional bank in Kansas offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and credit card products with FDIC insurance backing.
description_long:
The Community Bank operates as a traditional community bank with locations in Liberal, Kismet, and Hugoton, Kansas. The bank is FDIC-insured, meaning deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing standard deposit protection up to applicable limits.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including multiple checking account tiers (Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Cash Back, Budget Checking, Classic Checking), savings options (Kasasa Saver, Regular Savings, Money Market Investment, Christmas Club), certificates of deposit, individual retirement accounts, personal loans, auto loans, home equity loans, and Visa credit cards. On the business side, they provide business checking accounts (Business Checking, Business NOW Checking, Hobby Checking), business savings, business money market investments, business loans, and Visa business credit cards.

The Community Bank distinguishes itself through locally-focused service with physical branch locations and personalized support. They offer 24-hour telephone banking at (620) 624-6898, online and mobile banking platforms for remote account management, and bill pay services. The bank emphasizes accessibility, including AudioEye accessibility optimization on their website and Spanish language services.

As a regional community bank, The Community Bank serves as a traditional financial institution for personal and small business banking needs. However, customers should note this is a small regional bank with limited branch locations (three towns in Kansas), which may restrict convenience for those outside the service area. Loan products and rates would require direct inquiry as specific terms are not published on their website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts (Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Cash Back, Budget Checking, Classic Checking)
Savings accounts (Kasasa Saver, Regular Savings, Money Market Investment, Christmas Club)
Business checking accounts (Business Checking, Business NOW Checking, Hobby Checking)
Business savings and money market investment accounts
Personal and business Visa credit cards
Online banking, mobile banking, and bill pay services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
Multiple checking account options including Kasasa rewards-bearing accounts
Online and mobile banking with bill pay services for remote account management
Comprehensive loan products including personal loans, auto loans, and home equity loans
Business banking with dedicated business checking and loan products
Website optimized for accessibility with AudioEye toolbar and Spanish language support
cons: Only three physical branch locations (Liberal, Kismet, Hugoton, Kansas), limiting accessibility for customers outside service area
No specific loan terms, rates, or APR information published on website—requires direct contact for pricing
Limited geographic reach as a regional bank may not serve most U.S. consumers
best_for: Residents of Liberal, Kismet, or Hugoton, Kansas seeking local community banking relationships
Small business owners in the Kansas service area needing business checking and lending
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and traditional banking over digital-only options
diagnosis: The Community Bank is best for residents and small business owners in the Liberal, Kismet, and Hugoton, Kansas area seeking traditional community banking with FDIC insurance, multiple account options, and personalized local service. The main caveat is extremely limited geographic reach—this bank is not accessible to customers outside their three Kansas locations, making it unsuitable for most U.S. consumers unless they live in or frequently conduct business in those specific communities.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community Bank in Kansas offers personal and business checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with FDIC insurance.
